data.description:
## Why

The escaped bugs all began with unit tests feeding the differs hand-built `jira_snapshot` dicts in shapes the real fetcher never produces (flat `comments` instead of nested `comment`; `issuelinks` the snapshot never carried). The converged fix (per `jira-cli`'s pattern) is **fixtures captured from real Jira payloads, served through the production serialization path** — never hand-massaged. This is the foundation every other story in the epic builds on.

## What

- Capture **scrubbed real Jira REST payloads** for the exact responses the fetcher consumes: the paged `POST /rest/api/3/search/jql`, plus the enrichment maps `get_comment_map` (`{"comment":{"comments":[…]}}`), `get_issuelinks_map` (`{"issuelinks":[…]}`), and `get_parent_map` (`{"parent":{"key":…}}`). Store under `tests/fixtures/jira/`.
- A `FakeAcliClient` (in `tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/_fakes.py`) that returns those fixtures from the real method signatures (`search_issues`, `get_comment_map`, `get_issuelinks_map`, `get_parent_map`) so they flow through the production `fetcher.fetch_snapshot` enrichment — the fake adds NO shape massaging.
- Secret-scrubbing on capture (strip API tokens, emails, accountIds) via layered redaction (vcrpy-style), so committed fixtures carry no secrets.
- A `scripts/capture_jira_fixtures.py` (live-gated) + documented re-capture procedure so fixtures stay honest and do not rot into change-detectors.

## Scope

- In: captured fixtures + the fake client + capture/scrub script + re-capture doc.
- Out: the contract test that consumes them (separate story), the verified-fake honesty check (separate story).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `tests/fixtures/jira/*.json` hold scrubbed real Jira payloads for search + comment + issuelinks + parent (verified: no tokens/emails/accountIds present).
- [ ] `FakeAcliClient` serves the fixtures through the production fetcher enrichment path with no shape transformation.
- [ ] `scripts/capture_jira_fixtures.py` captures + scrubs from a live Jira (gated) and the re-capture cadence is documented.
- [ ] Fixtures are consumed only via the production code path (no test reads them and hand-reshapes).
data.title: Hermetic-but-honest Jira fixtures + verified fake client (served through the production path)
